keyEvents.text: Delay in match because of an injury Jordan Ayew (Ghana).
Delay in match because of an injury Reece James (England).
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Delay in match for a drinks break.
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Declan Rice (England) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
First Half ends, England 0, Ghana 0.
Iñaki Williams (Ghana) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Delay in match because of an injury Caleb Yirenkyi (Ghana).
Substitution, England. Bukayo Saka replaces Anthony Gordon.
Substitution, England. Nico O'Reilly replaces Djed Spence.
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Substitution, Ghana. Abdul Fatawu replaces Iñaki Williams.
Substitution, Ghana. Prince Adu replaces Jordan Ayew.
Delay in match for a drinks break.
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Substitution, England. Morgan Rogers replaces Jude Bellingham.
Substitution, England. Eberechi Eze replaces Elliot Anderson.
Substitution, England. Marcus Rashford replaces Noni Madueke.
Substitution, Ghana. Kojo Peprah Oppong replaces Marvin Senaya.
Substitution, Ghana. Abdul Rahman Baba replaces Prince Adu.
